hyperedges.label: Admin authentication flow
Formation management lifecycle (CRUD + share link)
Claude Coding Principles
Tenant lifecycle: create → magic-link → consume → session → activity → purge
Magic-link delivery: validate → API → create → email
Webhook fire-and-forget on tenant.created and tenant.deleted
Two cookie-based auth schemes: tenant session + super-admin
Analytics pipeline: Tracker → /api/track → recordEvent → JSONL → readAggregates
Shared data layout: data/tenants/[tenantId]/{tenant.json,sessions.json}
data/config/settings.json shared by super-admin, email, webhooks
Rate-limiting used to protect tenant access-link API and request-link flows
Magic link auth chain
Respondent survey submission chain
Admin results view + IA analysis chain
Super-admin dashboard + purge chain
Tenant isolation endpoints group
Deprecated 410-Gone endpoint migration set
Super-admin API surface (auth, tenants, activity, stats, export)
IA normalization prompt pair (craintes + attentes)
Graphify output artifacts (graph.html, report, prior query)
